The '''Battle of Smarck''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] raid against [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] forces in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]. In retaliation for the joint Black Sun-[[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] funded pirate raids on New Republic [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace routes]] during the crisis against the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends#The .22Council of Blood.22|Interim Ruling Council]], [[Red Leader/Legends|Red Leader]] commander [[Mirith Sinn]] led a multi-[[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] raid on Black Sun's forces on [[Smarck]], destroying their [[Spaarti cloning cylinder]]s there and helping unravel the connection between the criminal forces and the Ruling Council. During the fighting, Commander Sinn was contacted by the force's base informing her that they had intercepted a transmission from Imperial channels. Upon learning that it concerned the whereabouts of [[Kir Kanos]], Sinn's force broke off their attack and departed for an assault on Grappa's fortress on [[Genon]].
